database.name: VIEW SSTPC_PRELIQ_V
database.view: SELECT get_uuid() AS sstpc_preliq_v_id, mi.ad_org_id, mi.ad_client_id, mi.created, mi.createdby, mi.updated, mi.updatedby, mi.isactive, mil.m_inoutline_id, mi.documentno AS albaran, mil.line AS linea_albaran, uom.name AS unidad_medida, uom.c_uom_id, mil.movementqty AS cantidad, cc.c_costcenter_id, COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) AS costo, mil.m_product_id, mil.em_sstpc_isliquidated AS isliquidated, mil.c_orderline_id, round(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) / mil.movementqty, 2) AS costo_unitario, mi.movementdate AS fecha_movimiento, cbp.name AS tercero, mp.value AS codigo_producto, cd.name AS tipo_documento, au.name AS usuario, cbp.c_bpartner_id, cd.c_doctype_id, au.ad_user_id, mw.m_warehouse_id FROM m_inout mi LEFT JOIN m_inoutline mil ON mil.m_inout_id = mi.m_inout_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype cd ON cd.c_doctype_id = mi.c_doctype_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mil.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN c_costcenter cc ON cc.c_costcenter_id = COALESCE(mil.c_costcenter_id, mi.c_costcenter_id) LEFT JOIN m_transaction mt ON mt.m_inoutline_id = mil.m_inoutline_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = mi.c_bpartner_id LEFT JOIN ad_user au ON au.ad_user_id = mi.createdby LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = mi.m_warehouse_id WHERE (mil.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y' OR mi.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y') AND mi.docstatus = 'CO' AND mi.posted = 'Y' AND cc.c_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL AND cd.isreturn = 'N' AND mi.issotrx = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT get_uuid() AS sstpc_preliq_v_id, mi.ad_org_id, mi.ad_client_id, mi.created, mi.createdby, mi.updated, mi.updatedby, mi.isactive, mil.m_inoutline_id, mi.documentno AS albaran, mil.line AS linea_albaran, uom.name AS unidad_medida, uom.c_uom_id, abs(mil.movementqty) * (-1) AS cantidad, cc.c_costcenter_id, abs(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0))) * (-1) AS costo, mil.m_product_id, mil.em_sstpc_isliquidated AS isliquidated, mil.c_orderline_id, abs(round(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) / mil.movementqty, 2)) * (-1) AS costo_unitario, mi.movementdate AS fecha_movimiento, cbp.name AS tercero, mp.value AS codigo_producto, cd.name AS tipo_documento, au.name AS usuario, cbp.c_bpartner_id, cd.c_doctype_id, au.ad_user_id, mw.m_warehouse_id FROM m_inout mi LEFT JOIN m_inoutline mil ON mil.m_inout_id = mi.m_inout_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype cd ON cd.c_doctype_id = mi.c_doctype_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mil.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN c_costcenter cc ON cc.c_costcenter_id = COALESCE(mil.c_costcenter_id, mi.c_costcenter_id) LEFT JOIN m_transaction mt ON mt.m_inoutline_id = mil.m_inoutline_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = mi.c_bpartner_id LEFT JOIN ad_user au ON au.ad_user_id = mi.createdby LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = mi.m_warehouse_id WHERE (mi.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y' OR mil.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y') AND mi.docstatus = 'CO' AND cd.isreturn = 'Y' AND mi.issotrx = 'Y' AND mi.posted = 'Y' AND cc.c_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL
